name._value: Make a Slime & Mushroom Omok Set

0._value: It seems that #p228# in #m010001050# knows a way to find a different kind of fun in Maple World.

1._value: #b#p228##k, whom I met in #m010001050#, said he knows a way to enjoy myself when I get tired of hunting, and asked me to collect a few items. He said I could get them by defeating #o6#, #o7#, and #o9# found around #m10001000#. I should try to gather them when I have the time.

2._value: I brought the requested items to #p228# in #m010001050# and received a #b#t4080000##k! With this, I can play the Omok mini-game with other adventurers anywhere! I should remember to ask #p228# if I want to know more about the mini-game.

0._value: Hey, you! You look like you're worn out from all that hunting. My creed is to live a life of enjoyment! How about it? If you bring me just a few items, I'll exchange them for a mini-game item. What do you say?
Good! But you can't just play a mini-game right away. If you want to play the Omok mini-game, you'll need an #bOmok Set#k, such as the #b#t4080000##k.

1._value: To make a #t4080000#, I need one each of #b#t4031046#, #t4031047#, and #t4031048##k. You should be able to get them easily by defeating #o6#, #o7#, and #o9# found around #m10001000#, so please bring them to me. I'll be waiting for you right here.

0._value: Hey, sometimes you just need to take a break and look around! If you change your mind, talk to me anytime.

You've gathered everything I asked for! That couldn't have been easy—you're amazing! Alright! Time for me to show off my skills! Just wait a moment~ I'll craft your #b#t4080000##k in no time. Heave-ho!

You got your #b#t4080000##k, right? You can use this item anywhere in Maple World to open a mini-game room and have fun with others. If you achieve a high score, something great is sure to happen. I'll be cheering you on from here, so give it your best shot!

1._value: Oh, right. If you ever have any questions about Omok, just ask me anytime. I plan on staying here for a while. Now then, go on and try hard to become the ultimate mini-game champion, surpassing even me! Though... that's probably not going to happen. Anyway... I'm busy, so I'll see you later~

0._value: To make a #t4080000#, I need one each of #b#t4031046#, #t4031047#, and #t4031048##k. You should be able to get them easily by defeating #o6#, #o7#, and #o9# found around #m10001000#, so please bring them to me. I'll be waiting for you right here.
